components.name: Distributed radar, IR, 266 nm lidar and metrology
Crew, command, life support and stores

designs.name: Solarian 90 kt laser battleship
designs.note: Lasers v3 armament. Dry-mass target 90,000 t. Module system mass is an explicit estimate because Lasers v3 leaves it open.

components.name: Spinal EWAR and cooperative fire-control aperture
Radar, IR and 266 nm lidar suite

designs.name: Solarian 55 kt missile carrier
designs.note: 600 Javelins matches the lower reference class band; full-magazine flush is a doctrine choice, not a structural assumption.

components.name: Drone control, EWAR and cooperative fire-control

designs.name: Solarian 50 kt drone control ship
designs.note: The 101 carried drones are included as bay/C4I mass; drone flight performance is outside fleet schema v1.

components.name: Picket radar, IR and 266 nm lidar

designs.name: Solarian 5 kt screen corvette
designs.note: Lasers v3 spinal and PDL architecture; 24 offensive plus 40 defensive rounds is a role-balanced assumption.

components.name: Distributed high-coherence sensor and metrology lattice
Fleet UV dazzle and fire-control coordination array
Minimal human accommodation and maintenance volume

designs.name: Chanduran CATHEDRAL bracket lasestar
designs.note: PROVISIONAL: project knowledge has no authoritative Chanduran hull spec. 60 m / 4 GW brackets a same-technology aperture scaled from Lasers v3, not the chapter's unreliable 62 m / 3 GW claim.

designs.name: Chanduran heavy escort bracket
designs.note: PROVISIONAL Chanduran estimate. Inventory helps close a 164-bus initial battle-group load.

designs.name: Chanduran light escort bracket
designs.note: PROVISIONAL Chanduran estimate. Ten hulls plus two heavies and CATHEDRAL close the 13-contact roster.

missiles.name: Javelin 12 t six-torplet bus
missiles.note: missiles_v2 Javelin: six 25 kg-dry torplets at 30 km/s; Casaba effect is a transparent combat calibration proxy.

missiles.name: SICKLE 27 t eight-torplet Lancer bracket
missiles.note: Physical design uses missiles_v2 Lancer: eight 50 kg-dry torplets at 36 km/s. SICKLE label/inventory are scenario assumptions.

missiles.name: 200 kg MH kinetic counter-missile
missiles.note: Underconstrained defensive round retained as a conservative calculator baseline; the combat v1 resolver does not launch interceptor magazines explicitly.
